dict.string: World Clock: check the current time in multiple timezones
Keyword to check the current time in multiple timezones.

array.string: 🇬🇸 (UTC -2) South Georgia & the South Sandwich Islands / South Georgia

dict.string: Python strftime format string (only used when Format is set to Custom)

Use this field if you wish to rename a particular city. Add one replacement per line following the format:
Original // Replacement
> for example, Buenos Aires // Bahía Blanca
Calendar app to open when pressing ⌘+Enter on a timezone result.
Browser to open Google Calendar in (useful for separating personal vs work accounts).
🇬🇸 (UTC -2) South Georgia & the South Sandwich Islands / South Georgia
